---
name: Playtest report
about: You played the paper kit or the prototype with real people. Tell us what happened.
labels: ['playtest', 'non-code']
---

## Setup

<!-- Paper kit or digital? How many players, roughly who (friends, class, colleagues)? Which preset? -->

## What happened

<!-- The run in a few sentences. Which ending? How long did it take? -->

## The good

<!-- What did people argue about? What moment landed? Did anyone want to go again? -->

## The rough

<!-- Where were people confused? What rules question came up? What felt flat or unfair? -->

## Quotes

<!-- Anything someone said that stuck with you, verbatim if possible. -->
